title: Netflix CPTO on AI and the future of product and tech roles | Elizabeth Stone
summary: Elizabeth Stone, CPTO of Netflix, on managing AI-era product teams, the rise of systems thinking, and how to build excellence as an operating system
score_reason: High content potential with a clear practitioner perspective on AI's impact on product and tech roles, offering actionable insights for product leaders and technologists.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn how AI is reshaping product and tech team structures and the importance of systems thinking as a foundation for operational excellence.
partner_summary: Elizabeth Stone, CPTO of Netflix, discusses managing product teams in the AI era, emphasizing the rise of systems thinking and building operational excellence. This matters to product and tech leaders navigating AI-driven changes in team dynamics and role definitions. Readers should consider adopting systems thinking and new leadership approaches to thrive in AI-enhanced environments.
